summary: Complete testing of SportLyo rebranding and Coming Soon page functionality. All 8 backend tests passed and all 11 frontend features verified.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ returns 'SportLyo API' message (renamed from SportsConnect)
Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Backend: POST /api/waitlist-email stores email successfully
Backend: POST /api/waitlist-email handles duplicate emails gracefully
Backend: POST /api/waitlist-email rejects empty email with 400
Backend: POST /api/waitlist-email rejects missing email with 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with admin credentials
Backend: GET /api/events returns events list
Frontend: Coming Soon page shows by default when localStorage is cleared
Frontend: Coming Soon page shows SportLyo branding (SL logo + SPORTLYO text)
Frontend: Email signup form works - submits email and shows success message
Frontend: 'Accès équipe' link reveals key input form
Frontend: Entering wrong key shows error toast 'Clé incorrecte'
Frontend: Entering correct key 'SPORTLYO2026' grants access to full site
Frontend: localStorage sportlyo_preview set to 'true' after access granted
Frontend: URL param ?preview=SPORTLYO2026 grants direct access to full site
Frontend: After access granted, navbar shows SPORTLYO branding
Frontend: Footer shows SportLyo branding (SL logo + SPORTLYO text)
Frontend: Footer shows contact@sportlyo.com email
Frontend: Footer shows '© 2026 SportLyo' copyright
Frontend: Navigation works after access granted (Events page loads)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SportLyo rebranding is complete. Coming Soon page acts as gate blocking access to full site. Access can be granted via: 1) localStorage sportlyo_preview='true', 2) URL param ?preview=SPORTLYO2026, 3) entering SPORTLYO2026 in access key form. Email signup posts to /api/waitlist-email. All branding shows SportLyo (SL logo, SPORTLYO text, contact@sportlyo.com). Previous features remain functional.

access_methods: Enter key SPORTLYO2026 in access form

branding_elements.tagline: VOTRE PLATEFORME D'INSCRIPTION SPORTIVE ARRIVE BIENTÔT
